/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libterminalio.so -o /home/wegkamp/development/lambdascope/libs/terminalio/libterminalio.so CMakeFiles/terminalio.dir/src/terminal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/terminalio.dir/src/input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/terminalio.dir/src/console.cpp.o CMakeFiles/terminalio.dir/src/buffer.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wegkamp/development/lambdascope/libs/threader /home/wegkamp/development/lambdascope/libs/threader/libthreader.so
